title: Amtech L3700 3 Piece Offset Screwdriver Set
features: DURABLE: This handy offset screwdriver set is made from strong, chrome plated carbon steel for durability
VERSATILE: Double-ended with slotted and Philips cross point ends, and with non-slip knurled grips, the screwdrivers are ideal for accessing confined spaces
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: From the manufacturer 3pc offset screwdriver set 3pc double-ended offset screwdrivers with slotted and Philips cross point ends Durable chrome-plated carbon steel Non-slip knurled grip Ideal for accessing screws in confined spaces See More
